steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Wave power “varies in unpredictable ways”—we need a word for what it lacks.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs a word meaning steady or reliable — something wave power lacks, because it "varies in unpredictable ways." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Accidental: wave power isn't accidental — accidental means happening by chance, but the passage says power varies unpredictably, not that it occurs randomly by accident. ✗
  • Choice B — Consistent: wave power isn't consistent — consistent means steady and uniform, which is exactly what the passage says it lacks (it varies unpredictably instead). ✓
  • Choice C — Confident: wave power isn't confident — confident describes a feeling of self-assurance; it cannot describe a physical energy source's output behavior. ✗
  • Choice D — Expensive: wave power isn't expensive — expensive means high in cost, but the passage is about variability of output, not cost. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
